title: OpenClaw Personal Assistant Foundation
summary: Build a secure, cost-controlled, multi-agent OpenClaw personal assistant with enforceable contracts.
objective: Turn this repository into a production-ready personal assistant platform with schema governance and predictable growth.
constraints: All high-risk actions require explicit approval
Repository memory must stay structured and compact
Function behavior must be registered before automation changes

tasks.title: Harden gateway and tool execution boundaries
Implement cost controls and heartbeat quiet hours
Define multi-agent bindings and sub-agent policy
Enforce manual approval on all send-capable email workflows
Deploy Notion approval-gated Gmail send flow

decisions.decision: Adopt structured matter memory with strict JSON schema contracts.
decisions.rationale: Prevents ad hoc growth and keeps automation safe and auditable.

decisions.decision: Require manual approval for outbound email actions and block auto-send patterns by policy.
decisions.rationale: Mitigates prompt injection and prevents irreversible actions without operator confirmation.

decisions.decision: Allow only explicitly named approval-gated send workflows that require Notion 'Approved to Send' state.
decisions.rationale: Supports controlled automation after explicit human approval while preserving default deny behavior.

next_actions: Update function registry for each new workflow function
Create a new matter file for each major initiative
